name: lakshx-search
description: Semantic/embedding-based codebase search — ask the codebase conceptual questions via a local vector index. Complements grep/literal search, doesn't replace it.

lakshx.search.provider.description: Provider id from ~/.lakshx/providers.json to use for embeddings (e.g. "openai", "mistral", "gemini", "openrouter", "ollama"). Empty = auto-select the first confirmed embeddings-capable provider that's configured.

lakshx.search.model.description: Embedding model id to request from the chosen provider. Empty = that provider's default (e.g. text-embedding-3-small for openai).

lakshx.search.chunkLines.description: Lines per chunk when splitting a file for embedding.

lakshx.search.chunkOverlapLines.description: Lines of overlap between consecutive chunks, so a function/class straddling a chunk boundary still appears whole in a neighboring chunk.

lakshx.search.batchSize.description: Chunks sent per embeddings API request during indexing.

lakshx.search.topN.description: Number of ranked results shown for a query.

lakshx.search.maxFiles.description: Hard cap on files walked during a full index/rebuild.

lakshx.search.maxFileBytes.description: Files larger than this are skipped during indexing (likely binary/minified/generated).
